name: Maria Tallchief
abstract: Maria Tallchief, born Elizabeth Marie Tall Chief (𐓏𐒰𐓐𐒿𐒷-𐓍𐓂͘𐓄𐒰 "Two-Standards"; Osage family name: Ki He Kah Stah Tsa, Osage script: 𐒼𐒱𐒹𐒻𐒼𐒰-𐓆𐓈𐒷𐓊𐒷; January 24, 1925 – April 11, 2013), was an Osage ballerina. She was America's first major prima ballerina and the first Native American to hold the rank.

concerts.label: An Evening at Carnegie Hall to Benefit the Ecole Francaise

works.t: Swan Lake, Op. 20: Pas de deux of Odette and Siegfried (Act II)
